name: Ria Money Transfer - Variedades Emanuel
description_short: Ria Money Transfer is a global remittance service enabling money transfers to 190+ countries through 600,000+ locations with multiple send and receive options.
description_long:
Ria Money Transfer is an established money transfer company with over 35 years of operating history in the remittance space. The company specializes in international money transfers, positioning itself as a trusted provider that claims to have processed over one billion safe transfers. Ria operates a massive agent network spanning more than 600,000 locations across 190+ countries and territories, making it one of the largest distributed money transfer platforms globally.

Ria's service offerings are comprehensive and multi-channel. Customers can send money online through their website, via a mobile application, in person at physical agent locations, or through WhatsApp integration. Recipients have flexible options including bank deposit, cash pickup at agent locations, digital wallet deposits, home delivery, and ATM withdrawals. The company supports transfers in over 100 currencies and emphasizes competitive exchange rates and low transfer fees (as low as $1.99 for some transactions to Mexico). They also provide ancillary tools including a currency converter and IBAN calculator.

What distinguishes Ria is its extensive physical footprint combined with digital convenience. Unlike purely digital competitors, Ria maintains partnerships with local businesses globally, enabling cash-in and cash-out at neighborhood locations. The company has invested in modern technology including a mobile app (rated 4.9/5 on iOS), WhatsApp integration for frictionless sending, and real-time transfer tracking. Their brand partnership with the Mexican National Team signals significant scale in Latin American remittance corridors. The 4.5-star Trustpilot rating and 4.8-star Google rating reflect consistent customer satisfaction across major review platforms.

However, Ria functions primarily as a traditional money transfer service rather than a broader financial services provider. The company is correctly categorized in check-cashing/money transfer rather than personal finance or lending. For consumers seeking credit products, loans, or banking services beyond remittance, Ria is not the solution. The website does not detail regulatory licensing, specific compliance certifications, or fee transparency for all corridors—only example rates are shown. Additionally, while 600,000+ locations suggests broad access, actual availability varies significantly by geography, and some customers may face limited pickup options depending on their recipient's location.
address: Equaenvios LLC, 5702 Lyons Ave, Houston, TX 77020

company_info.headquarters: Equaenvios LLC, 5702 Lyons Ave, Houston, TX 77020

pros: Massive global reach with 600,000+ agent locations across 190+ countries, ensuring broad payout accessibility
Multi-channel sending options including online, mobile app, in-person, and WhatsApp integration for convenience
Multiple receive methods available to recipients: bank deposit, cash pickup, digital wallet, home delivery, and ATM withdrawal
Competitive low fees starting at $1.99 USD for certain corridors (example: Mexico transfers)
Strong customer ratings across platforms: 4.9/5 on iOS, 4.8/5 on Google, 4.5/5 on Trustpilot
Real-time transfer tracking feature allowing senders to monitor status from sending to payout
35+ years of operational history and claim of over one billion transfers processed, establishing brand trust
cons: Limited to money transfer and remittance services only; does not offer broader financial products like loans, credit cards, or banking
Actual availability and payout options vary significantly by country/corridor; website shows example rates rather than comprehensive fee schedule
Website lacks detailed information on regulatory licensing, compliance certifications, and full transparency of all applicable fees
Physical agent network quality and service standards may vary due to franchise/partnership model across different regions
No evident identity verification or account security features detailed beyond general 'safe' messaging
best_for: International migrants and expats sending regular remittances to family members in developing countries
Individuals preferring cash pickup delivery over bank transfers in regions with limited banking infrastructure
Customers seeking convenience of multiple send channels (online, app, in-person) within a single provider
diagnosis: Ria Money Transfer is best for individuals regularly sending money internationally who value convenience, speed, and access to cash pickup options across a vast global network. The primary caveat is that Ria is exclusively a remittance service—consumers seeking credit, lending, or comprehensive banking products must look elsewhere.
services: In-person cash payment for transfers at agent locations
Cash pickup at 600,000+ agent locations worldwide
